About

Who I Am

Strategic digital marketing professional with 6+ years of experience in social media marketing, E-Commerce marketplaces marketing, Performance Marketing, Product Creatives, AEO, GEO, SEO-driven growth and Website Development. Experienced in handling end-to-end digital operations including paid advertising, marketplace optimization, conversion rate improvement, performance analytics, and building brand visibility across digital platforms — now growing with AI.

I specialize in turning scattered marketing efforts into structured, measurable growth — whether that's scaling a Meta Ads campaign, optimizing an Amazon listing, or building an SEO roadmap from scratch.

🏍️ Biker  ·  ✈️ Passionate Traveller  ·  🎬 Video Creator on YouTube
